title: Inference Engine
description: Select which inference engine to use. 'llamacpp' uses llama.cpp server. 'ax-serving' uses ax-serving (Apple Silicon only, requires ax-serving binary).

title: Version & Backend
description: Select which llama.cpp version and hardware backend to use.

title: Environment Variables
description: Custom environment variables passed to the llama.cpp server (e.g. GGML_VK_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0,1).

title: Auto-Update Engine
description: Automatically download newer llama.cpp versions when available.

title: Auto-Unload
description: Automatically unload the current model when loading a new one to free memory.

title: Load Timeout (seconds)
description: Maximum time to wait for a model to load before giving up.

title: Auto Memory Fit
description: Automatically adjust context size and batch size to fit within available memory.

title: Memory Margin (MiB)
description: Target memory headroom per device when auto-fitting.

title: Minimum Context Size
description: Minimum context window size when auto-fitting is enabled.

title: CPU Threads
description: Number of CPU threads for token generation. -1 = use all logical cores.

title: Batch Threads
description: CPU threads for prompt processing. -1 = same as threads.

title: Context Shift
description: Slide the context window when the input exceeds the context length.

title: Max Tokens
description: Maximum tokens to generate per request. -1 = unlimited.

title: Micro-Batch Size
description: Physical batch size for generation. Smaller values use less memory.

title: GPU Devices
description: Comma-separated GPU device IDs for offloading (e.g. CUDA0,CUDA1). Leave empty for auto.

title: Multi-GPU Split Mode
description: How to distribute layers across multiple GPUs.

title: Primary GPU
description: Index of the primary GPU (0-based).

title: GPU Layers
description: Number of model layers to offload to GPU. -1 = all layers, 0 = CPU-only.

title: Flash Attention
description: Enable Flash Attention for faster inference and lower memory usage.

title: Continuous Batching
description: Allow multiple concurrent inference requests to share the same model session.

title: Disable Memory Mapping
description: Load the model fully into RAM instead of memory-mapping. Slower load, reduces page faults.

title: Lock Memory
description: Prevent the model from being swapped to disk.

title: KV Cache Key Type
description: Precision for attention key vectors. Lower precision saves memory.

title: KV Cache Value Type
description: Precision for attention value vectors. Requires Flash Attention = on.

title: KV Cache Defrag Threshold
description: Trigger KV cache defragmentation when fragmentation exceeds this ratio.

title: RoPE Scaling Method
description: Context extension method for models with limited training context.

title: RoPE Scale Factor
description: Context length multiplier for linear RoPE scaling.

title: RoPE Base Frequency
description: Override the model's RoPE base frequency (0 = use model default).

title: RoPE Frequency Scale
description: Multiplier for RoPE frequencies.

title: Mirostat Sampling
description: Perplexity-controlled sampling. 0=off, 1=Mirostat v1, 2=Mirostat v2.

title: Mirostat Learning Rate (η)
description: How quickly Mirostat adapts to maintain target perplexity.

title: Mirostat Target Entropy (τ)
description: Target perplexity value. Higher = more creative, lower = more focused.

title: Grammar File
description: Path to a BNF grammar file for constrained text generation.

title: JSON Schema File
description: Path to a JSON schema file for structured JSON output.

title: Keep KV Cache on Same Device
description: Keep KV cache on same device (do not offload to CPU).

title: Use CPU for MoE Layers
description: Offload Mixture-of-Experts layers to CPU.

title: MoE CPU Threshold
description: Number of MoE experts to run on CPU.

title: Offload Vision Projector
description: Offload vision projector (mmproj) to GPU.

title: Context Size
description: Context window size (0 = from model, used when auto-fit is disabled).
